sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35916" key="e)noiki/dios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνοικ-ίδιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, or <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n35916.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">domestic,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὄρνιθες</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:156" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.156</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
